summary: Iteration 24 — Smart cancellation refund tiers. 22/22 pytest PASS at /app/backend/tests/test_iteration24_refund_tiers.py + full frontend RefundDialog + SettingsTab tier-editor verified via Playwright. Backend coverage: (a) GET /api/settings/public now exposes cancellation_tiers (defaults 24/100, 6/50, 0/0); (b) GET /api/admin/bookings/{id}/refund-preview returns full shape (paid_amount, hours_until_pickup, full_refund_amount, tier_refund_amount, tier_refund_percent, tier_threshold_hours, tiers, stripe_fee_estimate, pickup_in_past, cancellation_requested) — prompt booking 9fb00287 returns paid_amount=103.50, tier_threshold=6h, tier_pct=50%, tier_amount=51.75 ✓; (c) tier selection edges via seeded bookings → 30h→24h tier @100%, 12h→6h tier @50%, 3h→0h tier @0%, -2h (past)→0h tier @0% all correct; (d) PATCH /api/admin/settings persists cancellation_tiers and read-back via GET /api/settings/public confirms persistence; (e) POST refund endpoint auth + validation: 401 unauth, 404 unknown, 400 unpaid, 400 'No Stripe session associated' on prompt booking (expected — NO real Stripe refund triggered ✓), 422 on negative amount; (f) REGRESSION all auth-gated endpoints from iter18-23 still 401 without bearer (charge-wait-time, charge-damages, charge-mid-trip-stop, backfill-saved-card) + /api/quote with additional_stops still returns quotes[] + /api/admin/bookings still 200. Frontend coverage: AdminDashboard → search 'TEST-RFND' → click Manage dropdown → 'Refund payment' menu item (data-testid=refund-action-{id}) opens RefundDialog (data-testid=refund-dialog) with all 3 radios (data-testid=refund-option-we_cancelled/-tier/-custom), each showing correct amounts ($103.50 / $51.75 (50%) / —), 'custom' reveals data-testid=refund-custom-amount input, submit button label updates dynamically: 'Refund $103.50' / 'Refund $51.75' / 'Refund $12.34'. Settings tab → data-testid=settings-cancellation-tiers section visible with 3 default rows of hours+percent inputs (24h@100%, 6h@50%, 0h@0%), all 3 remove buttons + Add tier button present.
action_items: (Minor cleanup) /app/backend/server.py L2292-2293 declares `cancellation_tiers: Optional[List[dict]] = None` TWICE in SettingsUpdate. Harmless (second overrides first) but should be deduplicated.

(Endpoint path mismatch with prompt) Prompt describes POST /api/admin/bookings/{id}/refund but the actual server route is POST /api/admin/payments/{id}/refund (server.py L2969). The frontend RefundDialog.jsx L102 calls the /payments/ path correctly, so functionally fine — just update the prompt/docs or expose an alias to avoid future drift.

(Minor) POST refund with amount=0 currently still hits Stripe — server.py L2993 only sets the `amount` form field when amount>0, which means a 0-dollar request silently becomes a full refund at Stripe. Consider short-circuiting: if requested amount==0, return {refunded:True, amount:0} without calling Stripe (or hard-reject 400 'amount must be > 0'). Today this is masked by the 400 'No Stripe session' on the test booking — but on a real paid booking, a $0 selection (e.g. tier=0% with no custom override) would refund 100%. Frontend gates this via `disabled={chosenAmount<=0}` on the submit button (RefundDialog.jsx L231), so reachability is low but the server-side hole exists.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py L2918-2929 _select_cancellation_tier correctly sorts tiers desc by hours_before_pickup and returns the first tier where hours_until_pickup >= threshold. Past-pickup fallback returns lowest tier — verified end-to-end with -2h offset. ✅

server.py L2903-2915 _parse_pickup_dt treats the stored pickup time as UTC (comment says Pacific is implied). For tier math this introduces a constant ~7-8h skew vs. true UTC. For the prompt test booking which sets pickup_date/time directly to UTC values this is fine, but for real bookings entered as 'Pacific time' the hours_until_pickup will be off by 7-8h, which could push a booking from one tier to another near the boundary. Worth confirming with main agent whether to add a tz field on the booking or normalize at intake.

server.py L2964 RefundRequest.reason is `Optional[str] max_length=80` with no enum constraint — frontend sends 'we_cancelled' / 'tier' / 'custom', but server will accept anything (e.g. 'goodwill'). Probably intentional flexibility (the comment lists examples), but consider a Literal[...] enum for stricter audit.
server.py L2992-2994 amount=0 silently becomes full refund (see action item).
SettingsUpdate L2292-2293 duplicate `cancellation_tiers` field declaration (see action item).

success_rate.frontend: 100% — RefundDialog 3-radio flow + custom input + dynamic submit label + SettingsTab tier editor all verified

test_credentials: Admin support@turanelitelimo.com / TuronAdmin@2025 with 2FA bypass per /app/memory/test_credentials.md (override admin_2fa_challenges row with bcrypt of '123456' then verify-2fa).
seed_data_creation: Four ephemeral TEST_ paid bookings seeded with varying pickup_date/time (now+30h, +12h, +3h, -2h) to drive _select_cancellation_tier edges. Cleanup verified via module-scope autouse teardown fixture.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Refund tiers feature is green end-to-end (backend + frontend). Regression file at /app/backend/tests/test_iteration24_refund_tiers.py — self-bootstraps env from /app/backend/.env + /app/frontend/.env. STRIPE LIVE — POST /admin/payments/{id}/refund test deliberately uses prompt booking 9fb00287 which has NO payment_session_id, so request 400s at session lookup before touching Stripe. Frontend RefundDialog reachable via search 'TEST-RFND' → Manage → 'Refund payment' menu item. SettingsTab tiers editor reachable via Settings tab → scroll to 'Cancellation refund tiers' section. Existing unpaid regression fixture booking still 5d6c9c49-a7b5-4bd6-97b0-86cbffff288b.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — feature addition, not bug fix. Feature works as described in prompt.
